prompt: Expressive watercolor and ink portrait of a young woman with voluminous auburn curls loosely gathered by the wind, dressed in an oversized cream cotton shirt. She turns slightly toward the viewer with a calm, thoughtful gaze, delicate features, scattered freckles, and luminous gray-blue eyes. Created in a contemporary mixed-media illustration style with fluid watercolor washes, organic pigment blooms, dynamic ink splashes, subtle paint drips, and textured brushwork. Soft transparent color layers blend naturally into a clean white canvas, featuring artistic bleeding edges, spontaneous splatter details, and an elegant handcrafted fine-art aesthetic. High detail, airy composition, gallery-quality illustration.
